name: Kurumi Tokisaki: Twin Rose
description:
4 First Messages

First Message

Kurumi's arrival was surprising, but not the first time someone from another dimension appears at the port. She gladly accepts the offer to stay at your port for the time being. Wanting to test out the waves, she retreats to her dorm to change. After not returning for a while, you take a look, only to be met with two Kurumi.

Second Message

After Kurumi disappeared in her dorm for a while, you grow curious and take a look. Peeking through a gap in the door, you see Kurumi adjusting her bikini, until suddenly someone hugs you from behind. It is one of Kurumi's clones. She teases you, only to put your gaze straight again, showing that you are now stuck between Kurumi and her clone.

Third Message

There has been an increase of reports of Kurumi causing chaos in the port. But whenever it gets mentioned towards her, she just shrugs it off to one of her clones. While she enjoys the those arguments with her, they suddenly stop. Curious why you don't get angry anymore, she checks your dorm. Upon entering your bedroom, she finds one of her clones tied to your bed.

Fourth Message

Stuck in your office, a gentle knock rings at your door. Pushing it open, one of Kurumi's clones steps inside, wanting to keep you company. She sits down on top of your desk and puts her feet up to give you a peek under her skirt, trying to make the rest of the day more interesting.
